JEAN MARIE ELIZARRARAZ KRATKY SPECIAL NEEDS

calendar.matters:
Petition To Terminate Trust On Waiver Of Account
Off Calendar Aug-10-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jean Kratky appeared by telephone in propria Persona.
Randolph Stein (Trustee) appeared by telephone in propria Persona.
Terry Pore appeared by telephone in Propria persona.

The Court stated that it has enough information about the value of the trailer and that it is trying to figure out the best way to go forward. Mr. Stein stated that he sees no harm in the offer to transfer title of the trailer to Jean individually. The Court stated that it is more comfortable with terminating the trust and putting title of the trailer in Ms. Kratky's name, and that Ms. Kratky can then do what she wants with the trailer. Mr. Stein will prepare a form of order. The Court granted the Petition to Terminate Trust on Waiver of Account (subject to receipt and review of the order).

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: C. Cabasares. Not reported.

Petition To Terminate Trust On Waiver Of Account
Off Calendar Jul-06-2020 Continued To Jul-27-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Randolph Stein, Esq., Trustee; Terry Pore, interested person; Jean Marie Kratky, petitioner and trust beneficiary - by telephone.

Mr. Stein reports on the status of consents from the residuary beneficiaries of the trust, the age and value of the mobile home in which petitioner resides, and alerts the Court that due to the age of the mobile home, the current landlord of the land upon which the mobile home is parked may have the authority to evict the petitioner in the event of a change of ownership of the mobile home. The Court reports concern as to whether there is sufficient security of residence for the petitioner upon sale of the home. Mr. Pore reports that he has no intention at this time to sell the mobile home upon its sale to him. Mr. Stein also reports concern as to the loss of public benefits to the petitioner upon sale of the home.

After further discussion, the Court determines that all consents need to be filed, that it will want to review late filings, that a more definitive discussion of the consequences a change in ownership might occasion, and that the Court will require more information as to the status of Mr. Pore with respect to Ms. Kratky. The Court continues the hearing to July 27, 2020 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Mary E. Wiss; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputies Choi and Nuque; Reporter: Not Reported. (D306)

Petition To Terminate Trust On Waiver Of Account
Off Calendar Mar-25-2020 Continued To Jul-06-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
